title: SPEAKER PU LALBIAKZAMA'N SESAWNG AH JOINT YMA CULTURAL DAY A HMANPUI
content:
1001/2026-2027

Dated June 13th, 2026:Assembly House Speaker Pu Lalbiakzama, Chalfilh bialtu MLA ni bawk chuan vawiin khan Sesawng Joint YMA in Zo Ni (Cultural Day) programme, Sesawng playground-a an buatsaih chu khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian chuan thu sawiin, mahni hnam zia (culture) leh nunphung (tradition) hi mahni hnam innghahna lungphum pawimawh tak a nih thu sawiin, chumi chawm nung zel tura Sesawng Joint YMA in Zo Ni an buatsaih chu lawmawm a ti a. "Hnam hrang hrang awm khawmna India ram angah hian kan hnam nun kan vawn tlatna hian kan ram mawina leh ropuina a tizual a; Hnam dang laka kan zahawmna pawh a ni," a ti.

Speaker chuan tunhnaiah India ram chhung leh pawn lam atangin khualzin tam tak ten Mizoram rawn tlawhin, social media-ah video leh thlalakte tarlangin Mizo hnam zia leh nunphung a tha zawngin an tarlan thu a sawi a. Mizoram chhunga cheng zawng zawng te ṭanrualna avang a ni a ti a. Kan pi leh pu aṭanga kan lo inhlan chhawn tawh 'Tlawmngaihna' leh 'Aia upa zah' te hi kan nunpui tlat tur a ni a ti a. Chumi bakah chuan pi pu zai (Folk Song) leh hnam lam (Folk Dance) te, pi pu thawnthu (Folk Tales) te leh hnam thuam (Traditional Dress) te hi ṭhangtharte hnenah kan hrilhhriat reng a pawimawh hle a ti bawk.

He programme hi Sesawng Joint YMA ten khaw chhunga branch hrang hrang-te nen inlungruala an buatsaih a ni a. Chawhma lamah naupangte nen hun hman niin lam hrang hrang te an entir a. Chumi hnu ah YMA branch tinte inelna hun leh concert in a chhunzawm a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH PANGANG KHAWITUTE TAN TRAINING BUATSAIH A NI
content:
1000/2026-2027

Khawzawl, the 13th June, 2026 :Nimin khan Sericulture Department, Khawzawl District chuan Sialhawkah pangang khawi chhungkaw 30-te tan training leh infuihtharna hun an buatsaih a. He hun hi DSO Pi Melody C. Vanlalruati’n a kaihruai a, Dr. Lalthlamuana Pachuau, Scientist-D leh Dr.Pravan JS, Scientist-B, REC, Central Silk Board-ten farmer-te chu technical lama harsatna an tawh hrang hrangte sutkian dan tur an zirtir bawk.

Vawiin training leh infuihtharna hunah hian Sialhawk khua chu pangang khawi lamah an tihthat zia te sawi a ni a, mi pakhatin quintal 1 silk cocoon a thar thin thu hmangin kalkhawmte chu fuih thar an ni.

title: KHAWZAWLAH SHG NUHO TAN USHA CLASSICAL SILAI SCHOOL TEACHERS TRAINING BUATSAIH A NI
content:
999/2026-2027

Khawzawl, the 13th June, 2026 :June 3, 2026 - June 12, 2026 chhung khan Bethany Society Shillong-in USHA CLASSICAL SILAI SCHOOL TEACHERS TRAINING PROGRAMME chu Khawzawl RD Block SHG member-te tan a organise a, DPRC Khawzawl ah he training hi conduct ani, khaw hrang hrang atangin SHG member 15-te puanthui training ni 9 chhungin an nei a ni.

June 3, 2026 khan Pu K Lalhmuakliana PD, DRDO chuan training hawnna programme a hmanpui a, June 12, 2026 khan closing programme hman a ni a, Dr C. Danial ,Head of Department, Radiology, NEIGRIHMS Shillong chu Chief guest niin Certificate, USHA puanthui Khawl leh Classical SILAI School Signboard semna hun hmangin thu a sawi a. Pu Timothy R. Lalhmangaiha BDO/BMD chuan nuho fuihna thu tha tak a sawi bawk. He programme a hlawhltin theihnana hmalakpuitu CEO leh SMMU hotute chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk a ni.

Trainer ah Rilian designing studio neitu Tv Lalduhzuala, Khawzawl hman a ni a, Khawl remkhawm dan, a thiah dan, measurement lak dan, cutting leh nuho in an khawl mila an hman tangkai theih tur kawr design hrang hrang leh kekawr lam thui dan te an zir, training hunchhung a rei loh avangin a tam thei ang ber an thiam theih nan nasa takin tan an la a, zan lamah te homework in pein theih tawpin he ni 9 chhung hi an hmang a ni. Nuho in hlawkthlak an tiin ke khawl an dawng nghal vek bawk a, an lawm hle a ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER MEETS UNION HOME MINISTER
content:
173/2026-2027

Aizawl, 13 June 2026 :Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma, who is currently in New Delhi on official business, met Union Home Minister Shri Amit Shah at his office in Kartavya Bhawan on 12 June 2026 (Friday) and discussed several important issues concerning the development of Mizoram.

The Chief Minister pointed out that under the Security Related Expenditure (SRE) Scheme, Mizoram has not been receiving assistance unlike other Northeastern states because it is a peaceful state free from insurgency. He requested that funding under the SRE Scheme also be extended to Mizoram to strengthen government efforts in combating drug trafficking and cybercrime.

The Union Home Minister advised the State Government to submit more project proposals under the PM-DeVINE (Prime Minister’s Development Initiative for North Eastern Region) Scheme, a special initiative aimed at the development of the Northeastern region, and assured his support in pursuing them.

The Chief Minister also informed the Home Minister that nearly 40,000 refugees from Manipur, Bangladesh, and Myanmar are currently residing in Mizoram. He stated that the State Government has been making every possible effort to provide humanitarian assistance to them and emphasized the urgent need for support from the Central Government.In response, the Union Home Minister informed the Chief Minister that the Central Government would provide Rs. 10 Cr worth of rice to the Government of Mizoram for the relief and support of the refugees.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER LEH UNION HOME MINISTER INKAWM
content:
998/2026-2027

Aizawl the 13th June 2026 :Official thila New Delhi-a cham mek Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan nimin 12.06.2026 (zirtawpni) khan Pu Amit Shah, Union Home Minister chu a pisa Kartavya Bhawan ah a hmu a, Mizoram hmasawnna tur thil pawimawh tak tak a sawipui.

Chief Minister hian Security Related Expenditure (SRE) Scheme hnuaia hmarchhak bial ten tanpuina an dawn thinah Mizoram chu hel awmlohna, state ralmuang a nih avangin pek a ni ve lo a. Drugs tawlhrukna leh cyber crime dona kawnga sorkar tha tih chak nan SRE hnuaiah hian sum (funding) pe ve turin a ngen a. Home Minister chuan hmarchhak bial hmasawnna tura ruahman bik PM-DeVINE (Prime Minister’s Development Initiative for North Eastern Region) Scheme atanga project thehlut zawk turin a lo rawn a, a lo bawhzui sak tur thu pawh a hrilh a ni.

Chief Minister chuan Manipur, Bangladesh leh Myanmar atanga raltlan mi 40,000 dawn Mizoram an awm mek thu te, state sawrkarin heng mite chhawmdawlna tur hian theihtawp a chhuah zel thute sawiin. Sawrkar laipui tanpuina kan mamawh hle a ni, a ti a. Home Minister chuan raltlante chhawmdawlna atan hian Mizoram sawrkar hnenah cheng vaibelchhe 10 man hu buhfai pek a nih tur thu a lo hrilh a ni.

Attachment
